itinerary.title: Arrival in Kuala Lumpur & King's Palace Visit
itinerary.description: Fly into Kuala Lumpur. Check in to your hotel and visit the majestic King's Palace (Istana Negara) to see the royal residence. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Genting Highlands Scenic Excursion
itinerary.description: Take a day trip to Genting Highlands. Enjoy the cool mountain air, scenic cable car ride, and explore indoor/outdoor attractions. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Petronas Twin Towers & City Landmarks
itinerary.description: Marvel at the spectacular Petronas Twin Towers. Visit the historical Independence Square and the peaceful National Mosque. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur Shopping & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a leisurely morning shopping or exploring Kuala Lumpur before transferring to the airport for your flight home. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Malaysia: Kuala Lumpur & Genting Highlands
description: Explore the vibrant heart of Malaysia. Tour the bustling capital of Kuala Lumpur, marvel at the towering Petronas Twin Towers, visit the historic Independence Square and the serene National Mosque. Venture up to the cool slopes of Genting Highlands for mountain scenery, theme parks, and entertainment.
highlights: Explore iconic sights in Kuala Lumpur: Petronas Twin Towers and Independence Square
Visit the historic and majestic King's Palace (Istana Negara)
Enjoy the serene atmosphere of the National Mosque
Day trip to Genting Highlands with a scenic cable car ride
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
